tasks.label: Start iOS Simulator
tasks.command: UDID=$(xcrun simctl list devices available | awk -F '[()]' '/iPhone/{print $2; exit}'); if [ -z "$UDID" ]; then echo "No available iOS simulator found. Install one from Xcode > Settings > Platforms."; exit 1; fi; open -a Simulator; xcrun simctl boot "$UDID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
